jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Novartis India
jsonLd.description:
Novartis India has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Novartis India:
Novartis India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Novartis India!
